song_details.name: Samba Shivayanave
song_details.arohanam: S M1 G3 M1 P D2 N2 S ||
song_details.avarohanam: S N2 D2 P M1 G3 R2 S ||

content.swara: S - S N D P - m G | M - - G M P D N ||
content.sahitya: Sa - mba shi va -yana ve- - ra ji ta gi ri

content.swara: S - r N - s D - n P - d | M - p M - g M - p D - n ||
content.sahitya: Sa mba vi ma no-ha ra pa ra- tpa ra - kr pa- ka ra-shri

content.swara: S R sn - N S - n d D -N | dp- P D - mg s M -g mp dn ||
content.sahitya: Nive guru dai vam bani ye ve lanu se vim pucu sada mi dini shiva

content.swara: s r s n S - n s- n d N - | d n d p D - p d p m P - ||
content.sahitya: Parama da ya- nidhi vanu cu - maruvaka na - hrdayamu na

content.swara: s s s s m m m m P p p D d d | n s n s N d p d p m g m p d n ||
content.sahitya: Mahadeva mahaprabho sundara nayaka suravara dayaka bhavabhaya harashiva

content.swara: d s n d p m g m P - p d n d | p m- g g M - p n d n d -p d n ||
content.sahitya: Sthira madu rapuramu na varamulo sagu haru ni niratamu nu dalaci

content.swara: S - - s n n d - d p p m m g | M - - p d nd m-g m p d n ||
content.sahitya: Shri shubha kara shashi makutadha ra jaya vijaya tri purahara

content.swara: s m g s S S s r s s N N | n s n d D D p d p m P P ||
content.sahitya: Shrtajana lola dbhuta guna shi la krtanuta pala patituni lola-

content.swara: s M m g P p m D d p N n | d R r n S s n s n d P - ||
content.sahitya: Mudamba la ranga padabja mulandu padambu lujercu pashupati ni

content.swara: M p m P d p D n d N s n | S r s R s n s r S n d p m ||
content.sahitya: Gnyaanamu dhyaanamu snaanamu paanamu daanamu maanamu abhimaa namanucu

content.swara: g m p d n s n r S - s r n s | d n p d M - d p m - g m p d n ||
content.sahitya: Kanikara munacara nam bulukanu konushrutu lan - nutula sha rananucu (saamba)

content.swara: S r S N d N S n D P - - | P d N D p M P m G M - - ||
content.sahitya: Saresa regu ni nama man tram korina nu ni pa dabja man tram

content.swara: M g M P m P D p D N d N | S r S N d N S n D M p D ||
content.sahitya: Dasudau cinni krs nu niki dikkuni veyani shokkana thuni nam mukoni
